title: Pathaan
tmdbOverview: A soldier caught by enemies and presumed dead comes back to complete his mission, accompanied by old companions and foes.
synopsis: Pathaan is a 2023 action, adventure and thriller film from India and Spain. It has a 5.8 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a 16 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
